query:
ALTER TABLE `groups` 
ADD COLUMN `groupCategory` varchar(50),
ADD COLUMN `requiresApprovalChain` boolean DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN `defaultWorkflowId` int,
ADD COLUMN `approvalConfig` json,
ADD COLUMN `internalLiaisonUserId` int,
ADD COLUMN `internalLiaisonGroupId` int,
ADD COLUMN `slaOverrideHours` int,
ADD COLUMN `timezone` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Asia/Riyadh',
ADD COLUMN `workingHours` json;
